features.name: signed_input_wire_with_comparison
features.description: Code should include an input wire declared with signed keyword used in a comparison operation
features.snippet:
input wire signed [5:0] wire0;
wire leq_zero = wire0 <= 0;

features.name: signed_cast_on_comparison_result
features.description: Code should include a $signed() cast applied to a comparison result in a ternary expression

features.name: unsigned_cast_of_negation
features.description: Code should include $unsigned() cast applied to negation of a variable in a ternary branch

features.name: signed_input_used_in_always_block_assignment
features.description: Code should include a signed input wire used in a procedural assignment within an always block
